data.body: Code merged (Gerrit change 491 -> main). Completion verifier correctly BLOCKS close until the terraform is applied. REMAINING (operator, needs fresh AWS auth — session expired mid-run): cd infra/terraform && terraform init && terraform plan (expect exactly: ~ aws_cloudwatch_metric_alarm.deploy_errors modified + aws_cloudwatch_metric_alarm.root_disk_pressure added) && terraform apply. Then verify the probe publishes rebar/host:root_disk_used_percent within 10 min and re-run: rebar transition ac14-363f-4ba0-4b5c in_progress closed --reason 'Fixed: ...'
